name: Galaxy IT — Monthly Client Reports (Email + WhatsApp)

parameters.jsonBody:
={
  "type": "Email",
  "contactId": "{{ $json.contact.id }}",
  "subject": "Your Monthly Performance Report — {{ $('Format Email + WhatsApp').item.json.monthName }} | Galaxy IT",
  "html": {{ JSON.stringify($('Format Email + WhatsApp').item.json.html) }},
  "emailFrom": "Galaxy IT & Marketing <info@galaxyinfo.us>"
}

parameters.subject: =Reports sent for {{ $('Format Email + WhatsApp').item.json.monthName }}
